race.comment: GALACTIC FORCE (7) resumed from a spell with a sound third over 1012m at Sale when he did his best work late. Nolen is a key jockey switch replacing the 3kg apprentice, and from the inside barrier, she will take plenty of stopping. BENRIACH (1) placed over this trip at Sale, making good improvement, and then was beaten a whisker here in a blanket finish. Has been giving away starts, but has claims if Mertens can keep him in touch. DONEBRAVO (6) resumed over shorter at Sale and needed the outing. Has had two jumpouts since, and the blinkers are applied for the first time. Is capable of positioning forward and showed enough early doors to consider. PRINCE DE VEGA (10) was given time to settle over 1200m at Edenhope and improved beaten 0.8L. In the premier stable and is in the mix.
